calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: INV-074 crystallization-necessity: task-distribution-shift phase-3 redesign (supersedes 610f)
items.note: IGW-20260609-038 / failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-610f_2026-06-08 user-confirmed route (a). Replaces the noise-only phase-3 with a genuine TASK-DISTRIBUTION SHIFT (SD-054 reef-bipartite layout + hazard_food_attraction=0.8 -> flee-to-reef single dominant optimum conflicting with the phase-0-2 forage policy) so the un-crystallized control suffers catastrophic forgetting (D2 collapse) while the EWC-anchored arm resists (D1). reef_enabled in all phases keeps world_obs_dim=275 constant. Decisive substrate-incapacity fork pre-registered: if D2 still fails on a genuine task-shift -> accept INV-074 substrate_ceiling and STOP the 610 cascade. 5 arms x 3 seeds (42/43/44) x 2500 ep x 200 steps; verified wiring (_assert_fixes_wired) + D3 non-vacuity gate carried from 610f.

items.title: commitment_closure:GAP-4 SD-034/MECH-268/MECH-090 commitment-vs-contradiction behavioural, REWIRED onto the 603n-validated scaffolded_sd054_onboarding curriculum (supersedes the committed_mode_curriculum harness 468b used); pilot of the *c cohort
items.note: Successor (NOT supersede) to V3-EXQ-468b, the commitment_closure:GAP-4 Phase-4/5 OCD behavioural cohort. ROUTING: the *b cohort (460b/461b/463b/464b/466b/467b/468b) all RAN 2026-06-04; 6/7 were reclassified non_contributory + substrate_ceiling because in the committed_mode_curriculum loop the agent committed (beta latch engaged) but never tolerance-completed a waypoint / never hit a contradiction (n_closures = beta_release = n_windows = contradictions = 0 in EVERY arm). 468b was built on the committed_mode_curriculum (run_p0_warmup -> run_p1_consolidation), which trains commitment but NOT foraging competence, so it could not deliver runtime goal completions. This rewires the TRAINING harness to the FULL scaffolded_sd054_onboarding curriculum at the 603n config (Stage-0 -> Stage-0b -> P0 -> Stage-H -> P1 -> P2; ready=true 2026-06-11 per V3-EXQ-603n PASS), the 514n pattern -- the substrate that DELIVERS the foraging competence the *b cohort lacked. The agent is built with the 603n foraging substrate PLUS the commitment control-plane (bistable BetaGate MECH-090 + SD-034 ClosureOperator + MECH-268 dACC PE saturation + SD-033a LateralPFC + SD-032 dACC/salience) layered on; a frozen-policy commitment-vs-contradiction eval (ARM_SUBSTRATE_ON vs ARM_SUBSTRATE_OFF, same trained weights with closure+saturation off) runs in a P2-config env that ADDS the GAP-3 completion_tolerance(waypoint) + counter_evidence primitives. TWO env fixes 468b lacked (found at pilot 2026-06-12): (1) subgoal_mode=True -- LOAD-BEARING: both waypoint-completion paths AND the counter_evidence gate hard-require it (causal_grid_world 1664/1740/2067); 468b never set it, so its GAP-3 contradiction machinery was inert (contradictions=0 was partly a wiring gap, not only the foraging-competence ceiling). (2) num_waypoints=4 + tuned counter_evidence cadence (interval=5, prob=0.85) so injections fire DURING the brief committed windows (probe: 23 injections / 16 beta-releases-near-contradiction on the scaffolded-built agent). TWO non-vacuity gates self-route a substrate-not-engaged read to non_contributory (never a false weakens, the V3-EXQ-643/514n lesson): (a) the 603n contact guard (per-seed P2 contact_rate>0 AND z_goal_norm_at_contact_peak>0.4, >=2/3 seeds); (b) the commitment non-vacuity gate (ON-arm total_beta_elevated>0 AND episodes_with_contradiction>0, >=2/3 guard-passing seeds). Only when BOTH are met do C1 (beta_release_near_contradiction>=1) / C2 (ON committed_frac drop) / C3 (OFF perseverates) drive supports/weakens. evidence_direction_per_claim. validate_experiments --strict --paths OK; --dry-run end-to-end PASS (curriculum builds, contact guard passes, agent commits, contradiction fires, C1=True / C3=True at dry scale, routes residual_perseveration_open -- a real verdict, not substrate_not_ready). Pilot of the *c cohort (460c/461c/464c/466c/467c + 629b owed); 463b EXCLUDED (lone PASS, dACC saturation measured directly not closure-gated). Closes commitment_closure:GAP-4 (with 629b) on PASS. Runner NOT started.

items.title: MECH-057b trajectory-promotion-gate: test whether filtering incomplete hippocampal trajectories before E3 improves harm avoidance
items.note: EXP-0152 dispatch (IGW-20260611-204): first genuine experiment for MECH-057b (hippocampal sequence completion gate). Tests whether trajectory candidates from HippocampalModule should be filtered by completion quality (residue cost) before reaching E3. ARM_0_NO_GATE: baseline (all candidates reach E3, current V3 behavior). ARM_1_COMPLETION_GATE: test (filter high-residue trajectories, pass only best-scoring + minimum 2 candidates). PASS requires ALL: C1: harm_rate reduction >=10%, C2: completion_signal improvement >=5%, C3: gate filters >=15% of candidates, C4: E3 not deadlocked (>=2 candidates), C5: E3 functional (precision >=0.5), C6: baseline not collapsed (goal_success >=0.05), C7: no fatal errors. Smoke test clean (2 seeds x 2 arms x 2 train eps + 2 eval eps, no crashes). 3 seeds x 2 arms x 500 train eps + 100 eval eps x 200 steps.

items.title: MECH-171 vicious cycle: test whether early sleep phase disruption triggers cascading degradation through consolidation failure
items.note: EXP-0153 dispatch (IGW-20260611-203): first genuine experiment for MECH-171 (sleep disruption vicious cycle). Tests whether early sleep phase disruption triggers cascading degradation through consolidation failure -> attribution failure -> behavioral disorientation -> increased arousal -> further sleep disruption. Three-arm comparison: ARM_A_HEALTHY (baseline), ARM_B_EARLY (disruption at ep 50), ARM_C_LATE (disruption at ep 150). PASS requires (C1 AND C3 AND C5) OR (C2 AND C4): C1 slot diversity A>B+0.05, C2 B<C-0.03, C3 harm rate A<B+0.01, C4 B>C+0.005, C5 pred loss A<B+0.05. Smoke test clean (3 seeds x 3 arms x 18 train eps + 2 eval eps x 20 steps, no crashes). Full run: 3 seeds x 3 arms x 300 train eps + 30 eval eps x 150 steps.

items.title: commitment_closure:GAP-4 SD-034/MECH-260/MECH-261 verified-but-not-released behavioural, REWIRED onto the 603n scaffolded_sd054_onboarding curriculum (supersedes the committed_mode_curriculum harness 460b used); *c cohort
items.note: Successor (NOT supersede) to V3-EXQ-460b. Rewires the training harness from committed_mode_curriculum to the FULL scaffolded_sd054_onboarding curriculum at the 603n config (Stage-0->Stage-0b->P0->Stage-H->P1->P2; ready=true 2026-06-11 per 603n PASS; the 514n pattern) so the agent is foraging-competent, plus the commitment control-plane (bistable BetaGate + SD-034 ClosureOperator + SD-033a LateralPFC + SD-032 dACC/salience). Eval = ARM_CLOSURE_ON vs ARM_CLOSURE_OFF (same trained weights, closure off) in a P2-config env with subgoal_mode=True (LOAD-BEARING -- the waypoint-completion machinery hard-requires it; 460b never set it, so n_closures=0 was partly a wiring gap, not only the foraging-competence ceiling) + completion_tolerance(waypoint). Measures closure fires / beta releases / MECH-260 No-Go installs at completed-with-stable-rule_state ticks. TWO non-vacuity gates self-route substrate_not_ready_requeue below floor (never a false weakens): 603n contact guard + commitment+completion gate (ON committed AND reached sequence completions so closure had an opportunity to fire; n_closures=0 WITH completions=genuine weakens, WITHOUT=substrate-not-engaged). C1 n_closures>=1, C2 beta_release>=1, C3 nogo>=1, C4 OFF holds latch & never closes. evidence_direction_per_claim. validate_experiments --strict OK; --dry-run end-to-end PASS (curriculum builds, agent commits, completions occur). Closes commitment_closure:GAP-4 (with the rest of the *c cohort + 629b) on PASS. Runner NOT started.

items.title: commitment_closure:GAP-4 MECH-090/SD-033a/SD-034 delayed-reward persistence behavioural, REWIRED onto the 603n scaffolded_sd054_onboarding curriculum (supersedes the committed_mode_curriculum harness 461b used); *c cohort
items.note: Successor (NOT supersede) to V3-EXQ-461b. Rewires to the FULL scaffolded_sd054_onboarding 603n curriculum (514n pattern) + commitment control-plane. Eval = ARM_HOLD_ON (bistable) vs ARM_NO_HOLD_OFF (same trained weights, beta_gate_bistable=False) in a subgoal_mode + completion_tolerance(waypoint) env. Measures committed Hold-window length (delay), SD-033a rule_state persistence ratio (release/entry), and SD-034 closure coupling within 2 ticks of the delayed resolution. subgoal_mode=True is LOAD-BEARING (461b never set it; committed windows never formed -> n_windows=0). TWO non-vacuity gates (603n contact guard + commitment non-vacuity: ON n_windows>0) self-route substrate_not_ready_requeue below floor, never a false weakens. C1 n_delay_windows>=1 AND persistence>=0.5; C2 closure-coupled resolutions>=1; C3 ON mean_window_len > OFF. evidence_direction_per_claim. validate_experiments --strict OK; --dry-run end-to-end PASS (contact guard PASSED + commitment non-vacuity PASSED + real verdict residual_persistence_open at dry scale -- mechanism fully engaged). Runner NOT started.

items.title: commitment_closure:GAP-4 MECH-266/SD-032a competing-goals switch-cost behavioural, REWIRED onto the 603n scaffolded_sd054_onboarding curriculum (supersedes the committed_mode_curriculum harness 464b used); *c cohort
items.note: Successor (NOT supersede) to V3-EXQ-464b. Rewires to the FULL scaffolded_sd054_onboarding 603n curriculum (514n pattern) + SalienceCoordinator (SD-032a) + MECH-266 per-mode hysteresis rails. use_closure_operator OFF (closure injects a confounding mode-switch signal; 464b omitted it for the same reason). Eval = ARM_SYMMETRIC (legacy MECH-259) vs ARM_ASYM_STICKY_TASK (sticky exit rail on external_task) clones, in a GAP-3 dual_cue (two competing resource cues; requires SD-049, supplied by the scaffolded cue-recall bridge) env. Measures mode occupancy + switches. C1 asym task-occupancy >= sym + 0.10; C2 asym switches <= sym; C3 sym switches >= 1 (the mode-switching non-vacuity). TWO non-vacuity gates (603n contact guard + mode-switching gate: symmetric arm switched modes) self-route substrate_not_ready_requeue below floor, never a false weakens (the *b gap was n_switches=0). evidence_direction_per_claim. validate_experiments --strict OK; --dry-run end-to-end PASS (mode-switching ENGAGED: sym_switches=2 at dry scale -- the scaffolded agent switches modes, resolving the key risk). Runner NOT started.

items.title: commitment_closure:GAP-4 SD-034/MECH-094 satisficing residue-discharge behavioural, REWIRED onto the 603n scaffolded_sd054_onboarding curriculum (supersedes the committed_mode_curriculum harness 466b used); *c cohort
items.note: Successor (NOT supersede) to V3-EXQ-466b. Rewires to the FULL scaffolded_sd054_onboarding 603n curriculum (514n pattern) + commitment control-plane. Eval = ARM_CLOSURE_ON vs ARM_CLOSURE_OFF in a subgoal_mode + completion_tolerance(waypoint) env. Measures SD-034 closure-driven ResidueField.discharge_domain (discharge_events = closures with residue_centers_discharged>=1). subgoal_mode=True is LOAD-BEARING (466b never set it; completions never occurred -> n_closures=0). TWO non-vacuity gates (603n contact guard + commitment+completion gate) self-route substrate_not_ready_requeue below floor, never a false weakens. C1 n_closures>=1, C2 discharge_events>=1, C3 OFF n_closures==0 AND discharge==0. evidence_direction_per_claim. validate_experiments --strict OK; --dry-run end-to-end PASS (curriculum builds, agent commits beta_elev=8, completions=1, C3 true). Runner NOT started.

items.title: commitment_closure:GAP-4 MECH-266/SD-032a mode-stickiness dose-response behavioural, REWIRED onto the 603n scaffolded_sd054_onboarding curriculum (supersedes the committed_mode_curriculum harness 467b used); *c cohort
items.note: Successor (NOT supersede) to V3-EXQ-467b. Rewires to the FULL scaffolded_sd054_onboarding 603n curriculum (514n pattern) + SalienceCoordinator (SD-032a). use_closure_operator OFF (confounding mode-switch signal). Sweeps the uniform exit-rail ratio r in {0.10,0.50,1.00,1.50,2.00} via set_hysteresis_ratio on clones, in a GAP-3 dual_cue env, measuring mode dwell + switches. C1 mean_dwell monotone non-increasing in r; C2 dwell(r=0.10) >= 2.0 x dwell(r=2.00); C3 high-r-arm switches >= 1 (mode-switching non-vacuity). TWO non-vacuity gates (603n contact guard + mode-switching gate) self-route substrate_not_ready_requeue below floor, never a false weakens (the *b gap was n_switches=0). conditions=5 = the 5 ratios; episodes_per_run counts the 6 curriculum stages + 5x12 ratio evals per seed. evidence_direction_per_claim. validate_experiments --strict OK; --dry-run end-to-end PASS (contact guard PASSED + high_r_switches=2 + real verdict residual_dose_response_open -- mechanism fully engaged). Runner NOT started.
